briefing: Unauthorized access to Anthropic's Mythos raises security concerns in AI development.

articles.title: Show HN: Llm.sql – Run a 640MB LLM on SQLite, with 210MB peak RSS and 7.4 tok/s

articles.why_it_matters: Revolutionizes LLM deployment on limited hardware, expanding accessibility for developers.
